security.csp: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; frame-src https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://image.tmdb.org https://*.tmdb.org; media-src 'self' blob: data: http: https:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://tauri.localhost tauri://localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* http: https:; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Stream debrid media on your desktop.
bundle.longDescription: DebridStreamer is a desktop client for streaming media from debrid services. Browse and search indexers, resolve direct links through your debrid provider, and play in-app or hand off MKV/HEVC to a native player (VLC/mpv/IINA).
